task.title: Better extension mapping for markdown files
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #23204

Rather than having an exhaustive list of all possible markdown file extensions in `SourceType::from(<path>)`, maybe this could be configurable in some way? Maybe this could also affect default file discovery when we stabilize markdown formatting?

rating.rationale: The agent produced a well-structured summary of existing PRs that already solved the issue, but did not actually write any code or submit a PR itself. This is a research report, not engineering output — the task was to implement a solution, not describe one that already exists. Communication was clear but directed at the wrong deliverable entirely.
